title: clarification_request

question.description: The question asked of the user.

reason.description: Why this field is needed to proceed.

missing_field.description: The specific field that is missing.

options.description: Suggested answer options when the answer space is bounded. Always include { id: 'U', label: 'User-defined answer' } as the last item.

blocking_if_unanswered.description: True when the flow cannot proceed without an answer.

selected_option.description: The id of the chosen option (e.g. 'A', 'B', 'U').

text.description: Required when selected_option is 'U'. Contains the user's free-text answer.

user_response.description: Populated when the user has responded to this clarification request.

x-hard_rules: user_response must be present when the user has responded to this request
user_response.text must be present when user_response.selected_option is 'U'
blocking_if_unanswered must be true for missing_field: goal and output_format
options must be included when the answer space is bounded to a known set
when options are present, the last option must have id: 'U' and label: 'User-defined answer'
